recommendations.title: The Intruders
recommendations.overview: After the traumatic loss of her mother, a teenaged girl tries to uncover the dark secrets behind her new home, in spite of her father's disbelief.

recommendations.title: Howling Village
recommendations.overview: After her brother goes missing, a young psychologist visits an infamous haunted and cursed location known as ‘Howling Village’ to investigate his disappearance and uncover her family’s dark history.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.

recommendations.title: Operation Hyacinth
recommendations.overview: Not satisfied with the result of a murder investigation in Warsaw's gay community, an officer in 1980s communist Poland resolves to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn: Revelation
recommendations.overview: When calls to her grandmother go unanswered, Jamie Lowell uncovers the truth behind her mysterious disappearance.

recommendations.title: Moloch
recommendations.overview: Betriek lives at the edge of a peat bog in the North of the Netherlands. When she and her family are attacked by a random stranger one night, Betriek sets out to find an explanation. The more she digs, the more she becomes convinced that she is being

recommendations.title: Reclaim
recommendations.overview: After their newly adopted daughter goes missing in a small town, Steven and Shannon will stop at nothing to uncover the truth behind her disappearance and the dangerous secret behind the adoption agency they trusted. Risking their own lives, they wil

recommendations.title: Taste of Fear
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound young girl returns to her father's estate after ten years, and although she's told he's away, she keeps seeing his dead body on the estate.
